entries.statement: Package and deploy ML models to production serving infrastructure, including containerization, API wrapping, load testing, and rollback procedures.
Govern the enterprise reference data library, including controlled vocabulary management, change request processing, and version control.
Implement automated data testing on all transformation outputs, including uniqueness, not-null, referential integrity, and custom business rule tests.
Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build automation, test execution, artifact management, deployment workflows, and pipeline failure triage.
Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications, including environment configuration, dependency specification, secrets management, and environment parity maintenance.
Conduct code reviews for data application changes, evaluating code quality, test coverage, performance implications, documentation completeness, and adherence to team coding standards.
Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilization analysis, query performance profiling, bottleneck identification, and capacity planning for growth.
Manage application dependencies and package versions for data projects, including dependency specification, vulnerability scanning, upgrade planning, and cross-package compatibility verification.
